glosses.ro: a sta în picioare; a sta bine (cuiva)

translations.en: I have to stand on the bus.
translations.es: Tengo que ir de pie en el autobús.
translations.fr: Je dois rester debout dans le bus.
translations.ru: Мне приходится ехать в автобусе стоя.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que ir em pé no ônibus.
translations.vi: Tôi phải đứng trên xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ik moet in de bus staan.
translations.uk: Мені доводиться їхати в автобусі стоячи.
translations.hi: मुझे बस में खड़े होकर जाना पड़ता है.
translations.ro: Trebuie să stau în picioare în autobuz.
translations.ja: バスで立って行かないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (1st person singular).
Modal auxiliary in the present tense expressing necessity; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’) governing the dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘im’ in the dative, specifying location.
Lexical verb in infinitive form as complement of the modal ‘muss’; denotes the action of standing.

sentences.target: Die Schuhe stehen da im Flur.

translations.de: Die Schuhe stehen da im Flur.
translations.en: The shoes are there in the hallway.
translations.es: Los zapatos están ahí en el pasillo.
translations.fr: Les chaussures sont là dans le couloir.
translations.it: Le scarpe sono lì nel corridoio.
translations.pt: Os sapatos estão ali no corredor.
translations.vi: Đôi giày ở đó trong hành lang.
translations.nl: De schoenen staan daar in de gang.
translations.hu: A cipők ott vannak a folyosón.
translations.el: Τα παπούτσια είναι εκεί στον διάδρομο.
translations.id: Sepatunya ada di sana di lorong.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; agrees with plural ‘Schuhe’ in nominative, marking definiteness.
Common noun in plural; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (3rd person plural, present); describes the placement/state of the subject.
Deictic adverb indicating location; modifies the verb ‘stehen’.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’) governing the dative; introduces the locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘im’ in dative, specifying the location.

sentences.target: Wir bleiben vor dem Geschäft stehen.

translations.de: Wir bleiben vor dem Geschäft stehen.
translations.en: We stop in front of the shop.
translations.es: Nos detenemos frente a la tienda.
translations.pt: Nós paramos em frente à loja.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi dừng lại trước cửa hàng.
translations.hi: हम दुकान के सामने रुकते हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは店の前で立ち止まります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (1st person plural).
Finite verb (1st person plural, present); part of separable verb ‘stehenbleiben’.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP indicating where the stopping occurs.
Definite article in dative singular; determiner of ‘Geschäft’ after ‘vor’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘vor’ in dative, specifying the location.
Separated part of the compound verb ‘stehenbleiben’; completes the meaning ‘to stop’.

sentences.target: Lena und Tom stehen vor der Schule.
sentences.reading: /ˈleːna ʊnt tɔm ˈʃteːən fɔʁ deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Lena und Tom stehen vor der Schule.
translations.ipa: /ˈleːna ʊnt tɔm ˈʃteːən fɔʁ deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: Lena and Tom are standing in front of the school.
translations.es: Lena y Tom están de pie frente a la escuela.
translations.fr: Lena et Tom sont debout devant l’école.
translations.it: Lena e Tom sono in piedi davanti alla scuola.
translations.ko: 레나와 톰은 학교 앞에 서 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 莱娜和汤姆站在学校门口。
translations.ru: Лена и Том стоят перед школой.
translations.pt: Lena e Tom estão em pé em frente à escola.
translations.he: לנה וטום עומדים מול בית הספר.
translations.tr: Lena ve Tom okulun önünde ayakta duruyorlar.
translations.vi: Lena và Tom đứng trước trường.
translations.nl: Lena en Tom staan voor de school.
translations.uk: Лена і Том стоять перед школою.
translations.hu: Lena és Tom az iskola előtt állnak.
translations.hi: लीना और टॉम स्कूल के सामने खड़े हैं.
translations.pl: Lena i Tom stoją przed szkołą.
translations.el: Η Λένα και ο Τομ στέκονται μπροστά στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: Lena og Tom står foran skolen.
translations.id: Lena dan Tom berdiri di depan sekolah.
translations.sv: Lena och Tom står framför skolan.
translations.ro: Lena și Tom stau în picioare în fața școlii.
translations.cs: Lena a Tom stojí před školou.
translations.da: Lena og Tom står foran skolen.
translations.fi: Lena ja Tom seisovat koulun edessä.
translations.ja: レナとトムは学校の前に立っています。

tokens.explanation: Proper name; one part of a coordinated subject.
Coordinating conjunction linking two noun phrases in the subject.
Proper name; the second part of the coordinated subject.
Finite lexical verb (3rd person plural, present); predicate describing the state/location of the subject.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article in dative singular; determiner of ‘Schule’ after ‘vor’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘vor’ in dative, specifying the location.
